name: Scout Mira
dialogue: Past the fence, the wilds don’t play fair.
I patrol this stretch so nothing slips through.
You look like you can handle it. Let’s see.
preBattleLine: Mira drops into a battle stance — her team is already moving!
postDefeatDialogue: You’re fast. The wilds will respect that.
Keep heading south — Ironjaw Kade holds the next stretch.
